theme: Trigger format FR:/EN: in 4 deepening skills (manifest discovery fix)
summary: Manifest builder regex expects 'FR:' / 'EN:' delimiters in skill description for trigger extraction. Initial v2.9.0 ship used 'FR triggers:' / 'EN triggers:' which did not parse. Result: 4 skills had empty triggers in the manifest, breaking trigger-based skill discovery. Patched mine-voc, mine-vom, study-niche-marketdeepdive, deepen-brand-context. cross-deepening-signals already correct (no triggers, sub-skill operator_facing: false). Manifest regenerated, triggers now extracted correctly.

changes.reason: Trigger delimiter format: 'FR:' / 'EN:' instead of 'FR triggers:' / 'EN triggers:'.
Regenerated post-fix. Triggers now populated for the 4 deepening skills.

operator_impact: Trigger-based discovery now works for the 4 deepening skills. Operator phrases like 'mine voc' / 'creuse la voix client' / 'deep-dive niche' route correctly.
tested_on: Manifest regenerated, triggers field non-empty for all 4 patched skills
caught_by: Manifest review post-v2.9.0 — 4 skills had empty trigger arrays.
known_gaps: Manifest builder regex format (FR:/EN:) is implicit — not enforced by validate-resources. A future hardening could refuse SKILL.md with non-conformant trigger format.
